subject: Re: HI!
body:
please call sarah today ues.. I need you to come to the isalnd sarah is leaving to go on holiday

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, July 18, 2007 10:09:07 AM
Subject: HI!


Well hello.
I was hoping to see you today but not such a good idea..my glads are 
swelling and I just ran out to get some fresh juice to rid my body of these 
awful toxins!  Lets have a fun date tomorrow and I have something for you 
too!  Can't wait to see you and give you a gigantic hug!!!!!

-cd

_________________________________________________________________
http://imagine-windowslive.com/hotmail/?locale=en-us&ocid=TXT_TAGHM_migration_HM_mini_pcmag_0507
